message.content: @startuml title Planning Scenario 'default operator information' - V1.0.0 hide footbox skinparam shadowing false skinparam sequence { ParticipantPadding 40 BoxPadding 10 LifeLineBorderColor #777777 LifeLineBorderThickness 1 LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent MessageAlign left } skinparam note { BackgroundColor #FFFFDD BorderColor #777777 } participant "MP" as MP participant "Lookup" as Lookup participant "TO" as TO note over TO ProcessIdentifiers: DEFAULT end note note over MP,Lookup Endpoints that could be used by the MP: /operator/meta /operator/available-assets /operator/stations /operator/regions /operator/operating-calendar /operator/operating-hours /operator/pricing-plans /operator/information end note MP -> TO : e.g. /operator/available-assets activate TO TO --> MP : available assettypes (optionally containing assets) deactivate TO note over MP,Lookup Endpoints that could be used by the MP: /operator/meta /operator/information /operator/regions end note Lookup -> TO : e.g. /operator/meta activate TO TO --> Lookup : precise description of the implementation of the API deactivate TO @enduml
